Review.HumanAction: Enter valid username and password, click Login
Review.Expectation: User is redirected to the dashboard with a welcome message

Review.HumanAction: Enter an incorrect password and click Login
Review.Expectation: An error message is displayed without revealing which field is wrong

Review.HumanAction: Click the Logout button from any page
Review.Expectation: Session is terminated and user is redirected to the login page

Review.HumanAction: Navigate to Issues > New, fill in required fields, and submit
Review.Expectation: Issue is created with correct fields and appears in the issue list

Review.HumanAction: Submit the form with the Title field empty
Review.Expectation: A validation error is shown and the form is not submitted

Review.HumanAction: Open an existing issue and change its status from Open to In Progress
Review.Expectation: Status is updated and the change is reflected in the issue list

Review.HumanAction: Open an issue and add a comment
Review.Expectation: Comment appears in the activity log with correct timestamp and author
Issue counts by status are displayed and match the actual data

Review.HumanAction: Click Export to CSV from the issue list
Review.Expectation: A CSV file is downloaded containing all visible issues with correct columns
